articles.title: Orange alert for Chandigarh, Punjab, Haryana | Tap to know more | Inshorts - Inshorts
articles.search_term: ("heat advisory" OR "heat action plan" OR "heat alert" OR "IMD warning" OR "IMD alert" OR "red alert" OR "orange alert" OR "yellow alert" OR "NDMA advisory" OR "cooling shelter" OR "relief measures" OR "heat compensation" OR "severe weather warning") Chandigarh
articles.full_text: Residents of Chandigarh, Punjab and Haryana may get relief from the recent heat for a few more days as the India Meteorological Department (IMD) has forecast scattered to isolated rain and thunderstorm activity across the region till Saturday, while issuing an orange alert for Wednesday and Thursday due to the possibility of stronger thunderstorms accompanied by gusty winds.
